mapper.sql: id, operator_id, operation_type, target_type, target_id, description, client_ip, trace_id, request_url, http_method, request_params, before_json, after_json, result_status, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_operation_log ( operator_id, operation_type, target_type, target_id, description, client_ip, trace_id, request_url, http_method, request_params, before_json, after_json, result_status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{operatorId}, #{operationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{description}, #{clientIp}, #{traceId}, #{requestUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{beforeJson}, #{afterJson}, COALESCE(#{resultStatus}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
